title: Set of 2 Vintage Le Creuset Cast Iron Oven Dishes – No. 3 – Made in France (1960–1970)
description:
Charming set of two small vintage oven dishes from Le Creuset, crafted in durable enameled cast iron. These classic No. 3 dishes feature a beautiful color and a timeless design that looks wonderful both in the kitchen and on the table.
The enameled cast iron construction ensures excellent and even heat distribution, allowing food to cook perfectly while retaining warmth for longer. Ideal for preparing and serving individual portions such as gratins, roasted vegetables, small casseroles, or desserts.
Details:
Brand: Le Creuset
Quantity: Set of 2 oven dishes
Model: No. 3
Material: Enameled cast iron
Origin: Made in France
Period: Vintage, 1960–1970
Color: Beautiful classic Le Creuset color
Condition:
Good vintage condition. Please see the photos, which form part of the description.
